kpi_results.kpi: Scoped coverage — chain orchestration + jobs + shared adapter
kpi_results.actual: ALL FOUR met at scoped-total: 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% functions / 94.45% lines. Added 4 insight-chain branch tests + 17 jobs happy-path tests (108 scoped tests total) to lift the previous PARTIAL snapshot. Full per-file breakdown at artifacts/coverage/IFC-312-after.json.

notes: IFC-312 is a large cross-package wiring task (50 files, 21-32h PERT). Implemented across two Ralph loops (10-iter initial + 70-iter extended). VERDICT=COMPLETE: all 4 coverage thresholds met at scoped-total (92.97% stmts, 86.43% branches, 97.5% funcs, 94.45% lines), all 4 mandatory validations green, all 9 DoD items met. 141 total new IFC-312 tests (108 ai-worker scoped + 17 API router + 16 UI). Final gap-close in iter 2 of the 70-iter loop added `ifc312-jobs-happy-path.test.ts` (17 tests) + 4 insight-chain branch tests which lifted the earlier PARTIAL snapshot to COMPLETE. Pre-existing failures NOT caused by IFC-312: (a) infinite recursion in memory-retention.job.ts:106-108 (commit 74ac46693, before IFC-312); (b) reindex-worker test mock gap omitting 'prisma' export; (c) sonar-guard cognitive-complexity violations in pre-existing code in touched files (contact.router.ts, account.router.ts, contact/[id]/page.tsx) — my additions are small render blocks and do not push any function past the threshold. These are tracked in the Delivery Report §7 for hygiene follow-up. ADR-037 compliance explicitly asserted: reply-draft.job.ts hard-codes status='DRAFT'; assertion lives in ifc312-jobs.test.ts. Industry inference uses z.enum(vocabulary.keys) at invoke time to physically prevent off-taxonomy emissions. Sync suggestTags uses BullMQ waitUntilFinished(5000) to preserve the API→ai-worker boundary (no direct @intelliflow/ai-worker imports from apps/api/). New 'ai-entity-insight' queue deliberately distinct from lead-only 'ai-insights' to avoid routing collision. RLS enabled + tenant-isolation policy on both new tables. Real third-party enrichment provider + real inbox trigger are out-of-scope per spec §3.3 and deferred.

definition_of_done_items.item: Each AI toggle reads the tenant flag from the matching AutomationSetting before consuming the chain
aiEnrichment (contact+account) backfills empty fields on create via a shared enrichment adapter
aiTagSuggestions renders suggestions on both detail pages
aiInsightGeneration writes to {Contact,Account}AIInsight (both models) and renders on the detail page
aiIndustryInference classifies an account against AccountIndustryOption vocabulary
aiAccountScoring writes to Account score + records provenance

definition_of_done_items.detail: Scoped-total: 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% functions / 94.45% lines — all 4 thresholds met. See artifacts/coverage/IFC-312-after.json.
